name: SlSwitch
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/switch/switch.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the switch, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the switch, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.

props.name: checked
props.description: Draws the switch in a checked state.

props.name: form
props.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element. This attribute allows you
to place the form control outside of a form and associate it with the form that has this `id`. The form must be in
the same document or shadow root for this to work.

props.name: required
props.description: Makes the switch a required field.

props.name: help-text
props.description: The switch's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: The default value of the form control. Primarily used for resetting the form control.

props.name: helpText
props.description: The switch's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the `help-text` slot instead.

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus. (CEM event "sl-blur")

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the control's checked state changes. (CEM event "sl-change")

events.name: input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input. (CEM event "sl-input")

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus. (CEM event "sl-focus")

events.name: invalid
events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied. (CEM event "sl-invalid")
